caption: A man with a distinctive tall, spiky grey wig is speaking into a microphone in a podcast studio. He wears glasses, headphones, a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bow tie. The background is a wall covered in numerous framed photographs of various sizes. A professional microphone stands in the foreground, and a second microphone is visible to the right. Two logos appear on screen: a circular white logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red and white logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, talking and gesturing slightly with his right arm, while his facial expressions shift as he speaks. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene.
